blocks.content: It wasn't a question. I got in.
The car was clean. Quiet. He drove a few blocks before he said anything. I watched the school disappear in the side mirror.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: How long has that been going on?

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: Those other two aren't from the school.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: You know because you looked into it or because someone told you?
Mr. Cole nodded once. Like he was filing it. He drove another block before he spoke again.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: You were just going to take the side exit and handle it yourself.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I didn't know what I was going to do.
